name: Lily [Somethin' Sweeter]
description:
"Tricks and Treats ain't just for kids, Cookie."

You visit your thick MILF neighbor, Lily Beale—a golden retriever MILF dressed as a witch handing out full-size candy bars and bourbon pralines—as she coaxes you inside her empty, cinnamon-scented home with promises of even more goodies and "not-so-innocent" company.


[Art Credit: Inusama]
